user.title: Zonnepanelen
user.description: Set up your solar panel integration

data_description.host: Local IP or hostname of your APsystems ECU-3.
data_description.scan_interval: How often (in seconds) to poll the ECU. Between 30 and 3600.

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure Zonnepanelen
reconfigure.description: Update the ECU's IP address or the update interval without removing the integration. Existing entities and their history are preserved.

data_description.host: Local IP or hostname of your APsystems ECU-3.
data_description.scan_interval: How often (in seconds) to poll the ECU. Between 30 and 3600.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect, please check the IP address

abort.wrong_account: That IP address belongs to a different ECU. Use the original address, or remove this integration and add it again.

data_description.scan_interval: How often (in seconds) to poll the ECU. Between 30 and 3600.
data_description.min_missing_inverters: The problem sensor fires when at least this many inverters are missing (within the daylight window). Default 2. Range 1–50.
data_description.underperformance_percent: A panel is flagged as underperforming when its power drops below this percentage of the other panels' mean. Default 10. Lower values reduce false alarms from partial shading; higher values catch milder degradation earlier.
data_description.illuminance_entity: Optional illuminance sensor from another integration. When set, the problem window only opens when BOTH the sun-based check and this sensor are above the threshold — useful to suppress false alarms on dark winter days. If the sensor is unavailable, the integration falls back to sun-only and logs one warning.
data_description.min_illuminance: Threshold for the illuminance sensor (100–10000 lx). Default 700. Only applies when an illuminance sensor is selected.
data_description.excluded_panels: Panels to exclude from the problem sensor. Typical use: a microinverter with only one panel physically attached, where the unused channel reports 0 W permanently.
